transcript: Speaker A (AI): तुम क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): I trying to complete homework my teacher gave. Speaker A (AI): अरे, ये तो गलत English है। इसको सही English में बोलेंगे: "I am trying to complete the homework that my teacher assigned." [Oh, this is incorrect English. In correct English, we say: "I am trying to complete the homework that my teacher assigned."] Speaker B (Human): Okay okay. मुझे भी अच्छी English सीखनी है, पर मेरे पास कोई practice करने वाला नहीं है। [Okay okay. I also want to learn good English, but I don't have anyone to practice with.] Speaker A (AI): तो तुम मेरे साथ practice क्यों नहीं करते? [So why don't you practice with me?] Speaker B (Human): मेरे पास time कहाँ है? [Where do I have the time?] Speaker A (AI): ज़्यादा नहीं, रोज़ मेरे साथ बस 15 minutes practice करो, and कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी English अच्छी हो जाएगी। [Not much, just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, and in just a few days, your English will get better.] Speaker B (Human): Okay, पर मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे भी नहीं हैं। [Okay, but I don't have much money either.] Speaker A (AI): तुम्हें ज़्यादा पैसों की ज़रूरत नहीं है। तुम बस ₹1 में शुरू कर सकते हो। फिर पसंद आया, तभी continue करो। [You don't need much money. You can start for just ₹1. Then if you like it, only then continue.] Speaker B (Human): अरे वाह! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Oh wow! Then how do I start?] Speaker A (AI): बस install button पर click करो। MySivi app download करो and अपनी English learning challenge शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button. Download the MySivi app and start your English learning challenge.]
on_screen_text: TUM KYA [What are you], TRYING, HOMEWORK, AREY [Oh], YE TO GALAT ENGLISH [This is wrong English], I AM TRYING TO COMPLETE THE HOMEWORK THAT MY TEACHER ASSIGNED, MUJHE BHI [Me too], PRACTICE, TOH TU MERE SAATH [Then you with me], PRACTICE, TIME, ZYADA NAHI [Not much], ROZ MERE SAATH [Daily with me], BAS 15 MINUTES [Just 15 minutes], PRACTICE KARO [Do practice], AND KUCH HI DINON [And in just a few days], ME TUMHARI ENGLISH [Your English], OKAY, PAISE [Money], TUMHE ZYADA [You much], TUM BAS EK [You just one], RUPEE ME SHURU [Rupee start], PHIR PASAND AAYA [Then if liked], TABHI CONTINUE [Then continue], PHIR SHURU KAISE [Then how to start], BAS INSTALL [Just install], BUTTON PAR CLICK [Click on button], MYSIVI APP, DOWNLOAD KARO [Download], AND APNI ENGLISH [And your English], CHALLENGE, SHURU KARO [Start], MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1
summary: An AI avatar corrects a student's English grammar while he does homework. The AI addresses his concerns about lacking a practice partner, time, and money by introducing the MySivi app. It highlights a 15-minute daily practice routine and a 3-day trial for just ₹1, urging him to download the app.
